bundleFetchError: Metadata: Apps Script returned HTML, not JSON. Fix: Deploy → Manage deployments → Edit → "Who has access" must include anonymous access (e.g. "Anyone") so GitHub servers can read it — "Anyone within Healthbridge" blocks this job.
